results.title: The Monster
results.overview: Stranded on a desolate road at night, a troubled mother and her daughter are stalked by a terrifying woodland creature while confronting the trauma of their fractured relationship.

results.title: Monster: The Prehistoric Project
results.overview: Two Navy SEALS, Trevor and Doug, are sent to an abandoned island in search of a package, but instead of being the hunters, they find they are being hunted. During their escape, they come.

results.title: Hide the Monster
results.overview: On July 4th, 2016 hackers raided government networks and stumbled across a litany of unsolved cases the county refuses to recognize. The hacked footage shows Thomas and Alex as they attempt to help a young boy struggling to fit in.

results.title: Molly Monster: The Movie
results.original_title: Ted Sieger's Molly Monster - Der Kinofilm
results.overview: Molly Monster is going to have a sibling soon, but his good friend Edison is a little bit jealous and worried she might forget about him. When Molly's parents have to travel to the Island where monster parents hatch their eggs, Molly is not allowed to go because she is too young, nonetheless she decides to reach them on her own as soon as she realizes they missed to bring her sibling's gift with them.

results.title: The Bureaucracy Monster
results.overview: An intense and humorous montage about the horrors of an ever expanding bureaucracy.

results.title: Monster Strike The Movie: To The Place of Beginnings
results.original_title: モンスターストライク THE MOVIE はじまりの場所へ
results.overview: Monster Strike: The Movie serves as a prequel to the net anime series based on the game of the same name. The anime tells the story of Ren, who returns to his hometown with no memories of having lived there. When a a cell phone repairman installs the Monster Strike app on his phone, Ren finds himself pulled into a real-world version of the game and begins piecing his memories together again.

results.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Race Car Adventures!
results.original_title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Race Car Adventures!
results.overview: Blaze is revving up like never before in 3 race car adventures! Join the Monster Machines as they speed into the fast-paced city of Velocityville for all-new race car transformations!

results.title: The Monsters
results.overview: A look inside the minds of two students who have been bullied to the extreme.

results.title: Godzilla Against The Space Monsters
results.overview: A squad of army men led by the Army Commander  (Attack on Aaric) go out and recover a ufo that crashed a decade ago by a farm house back in 1963. Monsters from pollution and invaders from space come down to earth causing havoc, and a new war between man and martians. Will Godzilla be able to bring all monsters together to stop these creatures?!?!

results.title: Boggy Creek Monster
results.overview: In 1973 a horror movie titled The Legend of Boggy Creek was released. Focusing on a series of bizarre events that took place around the town of Fouke, Arkansas, the film was an instant success. But what was the reality behind the "Fouke Monster"? Boggy Creek Monster takes you where no film has gone: in search of the truth behind the legend...

results.title: Age of Monster
results.overview: Victor, who claims to have filmed a number of films he's not been able to release, unites around his deathbed his most faithful collaborator to present his posthumous work.

results.title: Field Freak
results.overview: A family moves into a cabin where they are attacked by the vicious Field Freak.

results.title: Spam Attack - The Movie
results.overview: A desperate alien, last survivor of a once infamous race of galactic invaders, is lonely. Only accompanied by a warrior robot it discovers a new planet with pretty strange beings on it: Earth. Earth is under control of a global dictatorship by the world president. So there's lots of space for a new dictator. The alien takes on the fight and soon sees itself in the middle of a revolution by the people for the alien.

results.title: The Limehouse Golem
results.overview: A series of murders has shaken the community to the point where people believe that only a legendary creature from dark times – the mythical Golem – must be responsible.

results.title: Monster High: Welcome to Monster High
results.original_title: Monster High: Welcome to Monster High
results.overview: Monsters once lived in hiding—even from each other—because they were afraid they would be in danger if humans knew they existed. But Draculaura, the daughter of Dracula, along with her best ghoulfriends, dreamt of a school where everyone was welcome and accepted for who they are. Determined to make their dream come true, the ghouls travel the world on an epic adventure to recruit new students. But even in this amazing place, there's drama: a villainess zombie is spreading trouble rather than friendship, and every student must live with the fear that their secret will be revealed. Now the ghouls must save their school so that every monster has a place where they belong and their uniqueness is celebrated!

results.title: Powerwolf - Live At Masters Of Rock 2015
results.original_title: Powerwolf - Live At Masters Of Rock 2015
results.overview: Recorded live at the Masters Of Rock 2015, and then released as part of the Metal Mass blu-ray box-set. The release also included music videos for Sanctified With Dynamite, Army Of The Night, Amen & Attack, and We Drink Your Blood.  Setlist:  "Sanctified With Dynamite", "Coleus Sanctus", "Army of the Night", "Amen & Attack", "Resurrection by Erection", "Armata Strigoi", "Sacred & Wild", "All We Need Is Blood", "Drum Solo", "Kreuzfeuer", "Werewolves of Armenia", "Blessed & Possessed" (stopped because Roel forgot the song), "We Drink Your Blood", "Lupus Dei".  Encore:  "Opening: Prelude to Purgatory" (played from tape), "Raise Your Fist, Evangelist", "In the Name of God (Deus Vult)"
